alkylation reagent: addition of 40 mM iodoacetamide for 1 h in the dark
alkylation concentration: addition of 40 mM iodoacetamide for 1 h in the dark
cleavage agent: digested overnight with Trypsin/Lys-C (1/10 w/w Promega)
collision energy: using 15%, 30% and 45% normalized collision energy Stepping
enrichment method: 96-well plates precoated with purified goat anti-EPA polyclonal antibody for capture
fragmentation method: a stepped collision energy high-energy collision dissociation (HCD) scan
instrument: infused into an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos Tribrid Mass Spectrometer
labeling: glycosylation efficiency of associated with the PglST268F K312E and PglSN28W T268F K312E variants was not due to increased expression of EPA6
reduction reagent: addition of 10 mM dithiothreitol for 1 h at room temperature
reduction concentration: addition of 10 mM dithiothreitol for 1 h at room temperature
